title: THOUSAND OAKS
prompt_preview:
[1 chunks] Task: Extract all distinct claims about AI or emerging technology in this press release. Do NOT assume a fixed number.
Output JSON only matching the provided schema.
Return concise, standalone claim_texts that could be tested against scientific literature. Exclude purely procedural statem

raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "A wide-ranging SARS-COV-2 antibody study is being conducted in Ventura County to determine the true prevalence of COVID-19.",
    "The study has involved collaboration among California Lutheran University, UC Irvine, UCLA, and 11Health, along with local agencies.",
    "The research is aimed at assessing the prevalence of COVID-19 antibodies among the general population of Ventura County.",
    "The study seeks to understand differences in antibody prevalence among segments of the population that are highly exposed or vulnerable.",
    "It is designed to evaluate how antibody levels change over time in individuals who have tested positive for COVID-19 antibodies.",
    "The study aims to ascertain the false-positive rate of the specific antibody tests used in Ventura County.",
    "Over 13,000 COVID-19 antibody tests have been conducted in Ventura County as part of this study.",
    "The first wave of testing provided a baseline estimate of the disease's prevalence prior to a surge in transmission during the summer.",
    "The testing protocol has been developed by the Oxnard Fire Department in collaboration with local healthcare entities."
  ]
}
```
